common.warning_expiration: ⚠️ This security code is strictly confidential and will expire in {expirationTime}.
common.security_notice: If you did not initiate this action, we advise you to secure your account immediately.
common.manual_code_hint: If the button doesn't work, enter the code above manually in the application.

confirmation.EMAIL_CONFIRMATION_DESC:
Hello {name},

Enter the security code below in the application to confirm your address and activate your account within the cooperative.

confirmation.TRANSACTION_VALIDATION_DESC:
Hello {name},

An action on the vaults requires your double validation. Details: {extraDetails}. Enter this code to sign the operation.
